_purpose: Single source of truth for tool names declared by tool-executor calculations. Every calculation file with `executor: "tool"` must reference a tool listed here. The DraftsMan runtime implements one Python function per tool entry and exposes them via Anthropic tool-use. Tool names follow `calc.<snake_case>` namespace.
_namespace_rule: Names must match regex ^calc\.[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$. Any new tool requires a PR to BOTH the calculation file AND this registry; the runtime CI refuses to load a calc whose tool_name is not registered here.

tools.spec_summary: BS 7430:2011 earth electrode resistance — rod / plate / mat / foundation. Iterative parallel-array convergence.
BS 7671 adiabatic equation S = sqrt(I²t)/k. Reads Table 54.7 k-factors and the protective device's I²t let-through.
BS 7671 Appendix 4 mV/A/m table lookup with installation-method + temperature + PF correction.
Cable containment fill factor — tray/basket/ladder/trunking/conduit. Resolves standard cable outer diameters.
IEC 60909-0 prospective fault current cascade. Computes Ik" + ipk + X/R at every node in the impedance chain. Drives db-layout selectivity + fault-level skill.
Jurisdiction-gated diversity factor lookup (BS 7671 App 1, NEC 220.61, IEC 60364-1 Annex C). Mixed-load diversification with future expansion headroom.
Jurisdiction-gated cable Iz lookup (BS 7671 App 4, IEC 60364-5-52 Annex E, NEC Table 310.16) with Ca/Cg/Ci/Ch correction factors. Drives cable-sizing skill + db-layout OCPD coordination.

_inline_calculations_note: Closed-form calcs run inline by the LLM (no tool needed). For reference: shared/calculations/lighting/lumen-method.json (N = E×A / Φ×UF×MF) — already shipped in lighting-layout v1.3.0 production.
_future_candidates: calc.selectivity_study (selectivity coordination between multiple protective devices — depends on iec60909_cascade)
